content: {"cards": [{"name": "Temple Guardian", "mana_cost": "{3}{W}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Cleric", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "His faith is his shield, his devotion his strength.", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A vanilla common creature that tests restraint. 2/4 for 4 mana follows the vanilla test (P+T = CMC+2 for defensive stats). White gets defensive bodies with high toughness. The efficient blocking body fits white's protective nature without needing abilities."}, {"name": "Radiant Pegasus", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Pegasus", "oracle_text": "Flying", "flavor_text": "Its wings catch the light of dawn, inspiring hope in all who witness its flight.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A clean keyword-only creature. Flying is evergreen and perfectly in white's slice of the color pie. 2/2 flying for 3 is the standard rate for common fliers. Simple, elegant, and teaches flying as white's signature evasion ability."}, {"name": "Divine Judgment", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target creature with power 4 or greater.", "flavor_text": "The guilty are cast out from the light of justice.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's signature exile-based removal at uncommon. The power restriction makes it conditional but still powerful against large threats. Double white in the cost ensures color commitment. Exile is white's preferred removal method as it's 'cleaner' than destruction."}, {"name": "Scholarly Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card. Scry 1.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge illuminates the path forward.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A classic cantrip that tests proper draw templating. Draw a card replaces itself, while scry 1 provides minor card selection. This follows blue's core identity of card draw and library manipulation. The rate is fair for common - slightly more expensive than pure cantrips but adds value."}, {"name": "Arcane Disruption", "mana_cost": "{2}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.", "flavor_text": "\"Your magic unravels before true understanding.\" \u2014Kytheon, Court Mage", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A soft counterspell that tests stack interaction wording. The 'unless' clause creates interesting decisions - opponents can pay to push through important spells, but the tax is meaningful. This teaches countermagic templating while being more interactive than hard counters."}]}
